name: Fixed rate—Leg 2
description: The value of the per annum rate of the fixed rate of leg 2.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI where the reported UPI is of a product with a fixed rate, and for other products, if applicable (Paragraph 380).
Required if Asset class is INTR, Contract type is SWAP and the UPI is for a fixed-fixed product (Paragraph 384(b)(i)).
May be optionally reported in any other case if Asset class is not CURR (Paragraph 384(b)(ii)).
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO (Paragraph 380).
valueRules: Always reported as a decimal of any numeric value (positive, negative or zero) (Paragraph 379).
